overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character in a trench coat walking through a neon-lit urban environment at night. The character moves from a covered promenade through an enclosed bridge and emerges into an open plaza with a large circular fountain and the Nexus Tower building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway passing holographic ads and concrete pillars

entered.detail: large structural pillars supporting the overhead cover
floating holographic displays showing product advertisements
illuminated signs mounted on the right wall
metal trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban promenade lined with concrete pillars. Holographic advertisements float on the left side while neon signs illuminate the right wall. The environment is sheltered and artificially lit, with a empty pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction barrier corridor leading to bridge entrance

events.description: passing through red and white construction barriers into the metal bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking through construction barriers into the enclosed bridge entrance

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic barriers lining the path
industrial metal framework of the bridge entrance

segments.scene_description: The character passes through construction barriers into a narrower corridor approaching a metal bridge structure. The concrete pillars from the promenade fall behind as the enclosed bridge entrance comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed metal truss pedestrian bridge with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit enclosed bridge with metal truss walls and overhead fluorescent lights

entered.detail: rough concrete walls with exposed wiring and pipes
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling
small digital screens mounted on the bridge walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit enclosed bridge with metal truss walls and concrete surfaces. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the metal grate floor as the character moves through the confined industrial passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with neon-lit Nexus Tower and circular fountain

events.description: exiting the enclosed bridge into the open plaza with Nexus Tower visible ahead
turning right to walk around the circular fountain

agents.ego_description: emerging from the bridge and approaching the circular fountain in the neon-lit plaza

entered.detail: tall building with large red SEVERE RISK TERRORIST ATTACK sign and yellow NEXUS TOWER lettering
large circular fountain with water jets and blue neon rim lighting
white and black vehicles parked along the plaza edge
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character exits the enclosed bridge into a wide open plaza dominated by the Nexus Tower with its prominent red neon signage. The circular fountain with blue neon lighting sits in the center of the wet asphalt plaza. The character turns right to walk around the fountain as parked cars line the plaza edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular fountain plaza with wet reflective pavement

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular fountain observing the water jets and neon reflections on the wet ground

entered.detail: water spraying upward from the center of the circular fountain

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the circular fountain, walking on wet asphalt that reflects the vibrant neon lights from the surrounding buildings. The Nexus Tower remains visible to the left while water jets spray from the fountain center. The plaza is largely empty with only a few distant figures and parked vehicles visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban promenade through a confined industrial passage and into a vast, neon-lit open plaza. It begins along a covered walkway lined with concrete pillars and floating holographic advertisements, moving past construction barriers as the space narrows toward a metal bridge. The scene then shifts into the dimly lit interior of the enclosed bridge, where fluorescent lights flicker over metal grate floors and truss walls. As the character exits the bridge, the environment suddenly expands into a wide plaza dominated by the towering Nexus Tower and its red neon signage. The camera finally circles a blue-lit fountain on wet asphalt, capturing the vibrant reflections of the surrounding city lights as the character moves through the open square.
